release_notes.de:
Version 0.3.8.0 - Custom Editor Integration.
- 📝 Neu: Eigenen, leichtgewichtigen EmberEditor integriert (als Beta in den Einstellungen verfügbar).
- 🚀 Fix: EditorManager lädt dynamisch EmberEditor mit nativem Lore-Highlighting.
release_notes.en:
Version 0.3.8.0 - Custom Editor Integration.
- 📝 New: Integrated a lightweight, custom built EmberEditor (available as Beta in settings).
- 🚀 Fix: EditorManager dynamically loads EmberEditor with native Lore Highlighting.
